text.random2: It looks like Logistics forgot to deliver this page.
text.random3: The map indicates that this page exists. The map was wrong.

generic.no_data: No eligible object for Timeline mode at the moment.

recon.title: Recon
recon.explanation_1: A reconnaissance team managed to capture a close-up image of enemy equipment before retreating. Information is limited: observe every visible detail and identify the object or vehicle.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.explanation_1: Military archives are incomplete. Find out during which war each piece of equipment was first seen. The closer your estimate is to the correct war, the higher your score will be.

armory.title: Armory
armory.explanation_1: An item of equipment has been removed from all archives, leaving behind only a simple silhouette. Rely on your knowledge of the arsenal to identify the hidden weapon before it returns to the battlefield.

exaguessr.title: Exaguessr
exaguessr.explanation_1: The names have been lost, but several iconic locations of a hexagon are still readable. Analyze these clues and identify the region they come from before confirming your answer.

classic.title: Classic
classic.explanation_1: Intelligence has intercepted the characteristics of an unknown piece of equipment. Compare each report with your guesses, analyze differences in faction, role, environment, ammunition, and introduction date, then identify the correct object before the enemy gains the advantage.

tooltip.name: Object/vehicle name
tooltip.milieu: Environment where the object/vehicle operates (Ground, Aquatic, Air)
tooltip.cost: Production cost converted to Bmat equivalent (per unit and without MPF)
tooltip.war: The War when the object/vehicle first appeared

legend.arrows: ↑ / ↓ : the correct War is higher / lower than your guess
